name: DRAGONBERRY
title: BACARDÍ Dragonberry Rum | Dragonberry Flavoured Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.
marketing_description: BACARDÍ Dragonberry rum brings you a bold new flavour that's unlike any spirit you've ever tasted. It's perfect for mixing cocktails to remember.
how_to_serve: Try our Dragonberry and ginger ale cocktail. You can also mix flavoured rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade.

faq_items.question: WHAT CAN YOU MIX FLAVORED RUM WITH?
faq_items.answer: Flavored rum gives your taste buds an extra element of surprise. You can mix flavored rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade.

faq_items.question: IS FLAVORED RUM SWEET?
faq_items.answer: Flavored, fruity rums come in a range of tasting experiences, from soft and sweet to sour and tangy.

faq_items.question: HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM?
faq_items.answer: We make rum by distilling sugarcane molasses and fermenting it with yeast and water. Rum originates from Barbados with its roots going back as far as the 17th century.

raw_text_excerpt: DRAGONBERRY Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries. BACARDÍ Dragonberry rum brings you a bold new flavour that's unlike any spirit you've ever tasted. TRY OUR BACARDI DRAGONBERRY & GINGER ALE COCKTAIL, IT'S DELICIOUS AND REFRESHING!

source_metadata.description: Sip on strawberries full to bursting and the subtle flavors of dragon fruit. This rum is perfect for mixing cocktails to remember - try our Dragonberry Rum today
